fields.title: Replace Beads tooling with backlog tooling and renderer
fields.description: Expose backlog as tau's only planning UI surface by replacing the Beads wrapper, slash command, and renderer.
fields.design: Replace extensions/tau/src/beads/index.ts with a backlog integration module that registers a backlog tool, /backlog slash command, and custom renderers. Reuse the compact expandable issue-row presentation from the existing Beads renderer where it still fits backlog commands. Remove tau-owned bd and /bd surfaces entirely.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Tau exposes a backlog tool callable with CLI-style commands. /backlog executes and renders with tau-native custom UI. List, show, create, update, close, dependency, comment, and status views support collapsed and expanded rendering. No tau-owned bd tool or /bd command remains.
